items.titolo: Linux developers are using AI vibe coding to keep vintage AMD GPUs alive — R600 driver cleaned up with GitHub Copilot gives HD 2000 to HD 6000 series a new lease of life
items.descrizione: Linux developer uses AI to help update Linux GPU driver support for vintage HD 2000 - HD 6000 series.

items.titolo: I just saved $180 a year on my Google AI plan without losing my Drive storage - here's how
items.descrizione: Google AI Plus is cheaper now, and may be the easiest way to reduce my Google One bill without giving uo storage or AI.

items.titolo: Claude Fable 5 brings Mythos to the masses — Anthropic's new frontier model is 'state-of-the-art on nearly all tested benchmarks'
items.descrizione: After first announcing its scarily capable Mythos Preview model back in April, Anthropic is releasing a public version of Mythos, called Fable 5, that it says is "safe for general use."
